message:
fix(freeze): use arg_shadow for reassigned function parameters

When function arguments are reassigned (e.g., `end = end > length ? length : end`),
the frozen interpreter must read from arg_shadow instead of argv to get the
modified value.

Root cause: The vfold optimization in opcode_emitter.zig and zig_codegen_full.zig
was reading arguments directly from argv[N], which contains the ORIGINAL value,
not the reassigned value stored in arg_shadow[N].

Changes:
- opcode_emitter.zig: Always use arg_shadow for get_arg opcodes (safest approach)
- opcode_emitter.zig: Fix JSValue.instanceof -> JSValue.isInstanceOf typo
- zig_codegen_full.zig: Add has_put_arg check to vfold path for get_arg opcodes
- zig_codegen_full.zig: Split multiple toJSValueWithCtx calls across lines

Test results:
- Lodash: 127/127 PASS (was failing with array operations returning null)
- Zod: 10/10 PASS
- RxJS: 27/27 PASS
- tRPC: 20/20 PASS
